_doc: Wood Storage — visible storage prop for the wood resource. PR #4.0 (revised 2026-05-07): now uses the same InventoryStack + StackSystem pipeline as the player so logs stack identically (uniform shape, spring physics, top-surface anchor). slotCapacity 30 caps the visible tower; 3 slots × 30 gives room for ~90 logs side-by-side once we want fuller capacity. anchorOffset.y = 0.55 sits the stack base just above the pad's top surface (pad mesh size.y = 0.4, mesh-centered).
